title: AutoResearch explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code discusses AutoResearch from Andrej Karpathy as an early model of iterative self-improvement applied to software development. The video argues that while the approach isn't universally applicable, it offers a novel perspective on improving software through automated research and optimization processes.
